summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SkillSync AI platform. All backend APIs working correctly (100% success rate). Frontend UI properly implemented with glassmorphism design, neon accents, and responsive layout. URL scraping and form validation working perfectly. Resume upload flow limited by browser automation constraints but backend API confirmed working.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test complete end-to-end flow due to file upload limitations in browser automation
integration_issues.note: This is a testing environment limitation, not an actual bug. Backend API confirmed working.

passed_tests: All 6 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Landing page loads with glassmorphism design
Job description text input mode switching
Form validation (analyze button disabled without resume)
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Dark theme with neon accents implementation
Glass panel styling and backdrop blur effects
